title: AeroBlender
description: AeroBlender is a library mod dependent on TerraBlender, for adding biomes in a simple and compatible manner with Aether's biome/terrain system.
body:
![aeroblender_logo](https://aether.wiki.gg/images/thumb/7/7c/Addon_-_Aether_Biomes_API.png/800px-Addon_-_Aether_Biomes_API.png?20230703223036)


## What is this about?


AeroBlender is a library mod dependent on TerraBlender, with the intent to add terrablender's functionality to The Aether Dimension.
This API allows modders to add biomes in a simple and compatible manner with Aether's biome/terrain system.
It is mainly used in Deep Aether and other Aether addons.


## Requirements

Being a library mod to handle the Aether's biome generation, The Aether mod itself is required for it.

It also requires TerraBlender.
